name: vercel-cli
description: Manages Vercel deployments, reads runtime logs, inspects builds, and manages environment variables using `vercel` (or `npx vercel`). Use when user asks to debug a production error, check deployment status, view logs, manage env vars, or troubleshoot a Vercel-hosted app.
compatibility: For Claude Code or any shell-capable agent. Requires `vercel` CLI installed (or available via npx) and the user authenticated (`vercel login`). Project should be linked (`vercel link`) for project-scoped commands.
